footer.bugs: If you find any bugs, dm me on

HowToPlay.title: How to Play
HowToPlay.task: . Your task is to rank them from hardest (top) to easiest (bottom).
HowToPlay.video: Watch the video of each level, then place it in your top using drag-and-drop.

home.desc: Think you know Geometry Dash? Test your skills by ranking the hardest levels from most impossible to easiest. Can you beat the ultimate difficulty challenge?
home.brutal: Face the most brutal and legendary levels from the Geometry Dash demon list. From Amethyst to The Golden to Black Flag - can you rank them correctly?
home.vid: Watch mind-blowing YouTube videos of the most skilled players conquering impossible levels. See the raw difficulty in action before making your choice.
home.mastery: Prove your mastery by comparing your rankings with the official difficulty list. Only true GD legends can achieve perfect scores!

quizPage.title: Choose the difficulty
quizPage.friendDesc: You can create your own game with any levels you want. You can choose number of levels, choose any level, copy link and send your friends!

mode.error: Error: Unable to fetch levels. Please dm me on

quiz.title: View levels
quiz.topInstructions: Drag the levels. At the top - hardest.

results.title: Results
results.thanks: Thank you for playing! Join our
results.desc: Here are your results, green is correct, red is wrong

errors.fetchLevels: Failed to fetch levels. Please try again later.

errors.few: Too few levels selected. Minimum is 3
